data.body:
This new anti-DEI study is based on the false premise that DEI means "hiring managers on the basis of race." Diversity, Equity, & Inclusion is about halting discriminatory policies & practices. Centering a study on a wrong assumption doesn't yield accurate conclusions.

data.body:
“I never knew words could be so confusing,” Milo said to Tock as he bent down to scratch the dog’s ear.

“Only when you use a lot to say a little,” answered Tock.

Milo thought this was quite the wisest thing he’d heard all day.
